Cros Treewind's Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 124
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +5 MANA: +30
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG DRU BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Deity: Karana
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Cros Treewind's Staff
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 32
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 124
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +5 MANA: +30
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG DRU BRD
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Deity: Karana
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:6 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:180
Lucy Entry By:Chromite
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 04:11:51
Page Updated:Thu Aug 19th, 2021

Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 1
[Comments ]

Used to drop off "a defiled grizzly" in Qeynos Hills for a few weeks until a GM event of Cros Treewind's funeral.


Uploaded August 19th, 2021 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Why bother?
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2003 at 11:54 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
You're gonna seek this thing out and pay a ton for it simply because it doesn't drop anymore and for what?? As a conversation piece?? This is lowbie trash. You can do much better in bazaar without paying a fortune.

Edit:

I'm going to go out on a limb here and make a guess as to the true value of this thing if it or something similar turns up in Bazaar. This thing should trade in the 40-50PP range And that's assigning a value of 1PP for each point of WIS and 1PP for each point of Mana (a WIS caster or hybrid should be willing to pay at least that much for those two stats) plus the value of a typical Magic 12/32 2HB weapon. You pay more than that, you're an idiot. And don't forget about the deity tag. If you don't follow Karana, you can't use it even if your race/class says you can. This severely limits the number of people who will be wanting to buy one of these.

Edited, Thu Jan 16 11:43:23 2003
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Why bother?
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2005 at 8:19 PM Rating: Default
iganias
210 posts
yeah but this **** is classic though, there is also sentimental value too cause some people that played when eq began miss the old days and would like to have this as a reminder like me because i own one and i only keep it because of the old days

Kamoa Tornadospirit 53 Halfling Druid
-Bristlebane
▲ Page top
clarification
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 6:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758588779
69 posts
Having many human characters, I can tell you all about this thing.

Cros Treewind was supposedly "slain and eaten" by a grizzly bear(which is what this dropped off of). It was a rare spawn(and reaked havoc on newbs while it was up) and was quite high in level. This went on for a couple weeks until the GM event happened of Cros Treewind's funeral(I am pretty sure this wasnt only on Tallon). Items were given out, including a raincaller.

Anyway, This is no longer dropped, and its just one of those things that you use to say, "hey, i got one of these in a GM event!"
▲ Page top
Weak
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2002 at 2:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Oh boy a 2hb version of the dark ember, only with an extra 10 mana, and no proc. How useless. Anyone who'd have enough plat to buy this, could quest a testament of vanear, and buy a sharkbone hammer, and come out way ahead on stats and not lose too much on damage/delay. I can see why they took it out of the game. Nobody would use it past the point that they could get a decent secondary held item.
▲ Page top
aggroed on me
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2001 at 5:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361723645
5 posts
i was medding on my 37 pally, and i had my friend with me 35 ranger, and he started kicking my ***, but we got him down, took lots of ranger kiting and me medding to use my crappy heals lol but i got the staff, its nice, karana only, i think im gonna keep it since it no longer drops
▲ Page top
after thoughts~~
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 4:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1606090711584
128 posts
First time I saw this weapon it dropped off ... Cros Treewind himself. It may still drop off him if he is still around might try looking there. Unless of course he no longer spawns in Q hills. I have not beenback there in some time so I would not know. Thanks

CONFERMED!
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2001 at 10:24 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
it has been confremed by a GM that the spawn of the defiled grizzly is no longer spawbing. Also was told that this item CAN NOT be traded into Gm's for something else, for i have heard these rumors too. This should make the price sky-rocket (or at least i hope so) because this things are looking to be very rare, never seen another on my server. i am loking to sell, so if you have a decent price, send me a tell in drinal, my name is beekin ubriaco.
▲ Page top
RE: CONFERMED!
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 2:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762323414
109 posts
I don't know why people flip over items that no longer drop...If they are good items i can understand, then pay a bajillion pp for it, but if it's an item like this, i don't see the price moving much at all in either direction. There are 1hb weapons with a better ratio than this and with better stats too. ah well, hope you can sell if for a bajillion plat, lol. I guess you could equip it and say "this no longer drops and i payed 100 bajillion pp for it!" and some guy might say "cool..." LMAO

p.s. Making it "Karana Diety" Only doesn't help the price much either =P

Sorry for deep sarcasm, but gotta say what's on yer mind right?
▲ Page top
bye bye
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2001 at 9:36 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this weapon is no longer with us but if u want to buy one i am selling one on the luclin server (send me a tell) my name on that server is asalmon. i also will trade. too bad that hes gone though. i liked seeing a giant grizzly the size of king kong taking out the millers, the guards, and some npcs...it was just the greatest thing in the world to see him king their asses. well until he found me :) this weapon truly rocks
▲ Page top
No longer with us
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2001 at 11:51 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just want to say that the defiled grizly is no longer spawining. I have this weapon, pretty cool, but i want a 1hb (much better for a druid). Supposedly, this was a coupla month/week rare spawn, and you could exchange this weapon for somehting better with a GM. never folowerd up on it but i am SURE that this grizly doesnt spawn anymore. Which should make the prce sky-rocket (good for me) if you want one still, and are on Drinal, send me a tell, i am looking to get rid of it, name Beekin

▲ Page top
RE: where?
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2001 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It Spawns in Qeynos hills. I saw it "once" when I was hunting with my low level ranger near the Barbarian fishing shack. It popped up on my tracker and I laughed at the name "defiled grizzly". I thought someone raped a grizzly in order to defile it.
Note: I have never seen it since and that was a while ago.
-13 Ranger Half-elf
-11 Druid Wood-elf
